programmes.show_description: With the last mill shutting down, Craig shifts into overdrive; the late season push hits hard on the crew and the equipment; as breakdowns add up, driver Taylor hits his breaking point.
Reality series following truckers Down Under. Macca transports a famous yacht on an arduous journey. Rus-sell tries to get his business and his health back on the road to recovery.
Rescue teams are required for a 22-tonne houseboat washed up on a muddy bank of the River Trent by storm Babet, and a tractor unit and trailer with a trashed gearbox.
There's an emergency in Nottinghamshire when the ground gives way beneath a tipper truck fully loaded with stone aggregate. In Middlesbrough, a bus gets grounded on a grassy verge.
Teleshopping.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Award winning eFOLDi lightweight electric folding mobility scooters.
Shop JML, the home for clever ideas.
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
A group of snowplough drivers and vehicle rescue patrols dedicate themselves, all day every day, to keeping Britain's roads safe when big freezes strike.
Police race to intercept three men suspected of robbing a string of plumbers' merchants. A fleeing van speeds the wrong way round a major roundabout.
The officers intercept a stolen car, foil a cannabis grower, engage in a series of drugs raids and calm a drunken sailor. Series profiling the work of a high-speed police unit.
Western starring Rod Taylor and Ernest Borgnine. A gunman reunites with his love but their happiness is threatened by an impending Native American attack. (1967)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Western starring Rod Taylor and Ernest Borgnine. A gunman reunites with his love but their happiness is threatened by an impending Native American attack. (1967)
Western starring James Stewart. A self-minded adventurer locks horns with a crooked lawman while driving cattle to Dawson. (1955)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Western starring James Stewart. A self-minded adventurer locks horns with a crooked lawman while driving cattle to Dawson. (1955)
Driver Matt's been tasked with shifting a vintage Leyland double decker bus that's just undergone a major overhaul; he's making good headway until he notices something alarming.
The cops have their hands full with night time drink driving incidents. Four police cars are needed to stop a car with a motorbike hanging out of the boot.
A gang of burglars have broken into a house and swiped the keys to luxury cars. Then the thieves flee in three stolen vehicles.
Dog handler Duncan and the firearms team find themselves getting more than they bargained for when German Shepherd Tia joins them on a tense search.
PC Martain Anderson pursues a BMW driving on cloned plates. What do the driver and passengers have to hide? In Newcastle, a cop tails a car doing 50mph in a 30.
...Is Better? We're being pushed down the electric lane but is time up for petrol cars? We put both to the test, uncovering surprising benefits and unexpected pitfalls, from cost to performance.
During a lads' night out, an interaction with a stranger leads to a violent attack that leaves one of them fighting for his life in hospital. Can police track down the assailant?
On Halloween, Mulder and Scully investigate the death of a corporate executive who may have been murdered by an AI computer.
The LeBeau brothers' fleet battles muddy, sinking roads to get the last logs down the mountain before spring break up sends them all home.
Turbo is in a difficult situation as he pushes his truck and himself to their breaking points; Mark is forced to face the toughest job of his career.
A 46-tonne crane gets caught out by a crumbling curb, Mouse performs a late-night recovery of a tanker that's slipped into a sodden gully, and a damaged family saloon needs rescuing.
Sean is tasked with recovering a 17-tonne telehandler that's tumbled off a track, landing upside down in a ditch, while Mouse tries to recover a broken-down bus.

Officers intervene in a public case of espousal abuse, chase after a racing 4x4 and try to break a county-wide car theft operation.
The officers face a 40-mile dash to prevent a potential suicide. One of the Evos comes a cropper on the road.
Western starring Robert Ryan, Rock Hudson and James Arness. Three Texan brothers return home from the Civil War and find themselves on opposite sides of the law. (1952)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Western starring Robert Ryan, Rock Hudson and James Arness. Three Texan brothers return home from the Civil War and find themselves on opposite sides of the law. (1952)
Historical drama starring John Wayne and Richard Widmark. The saga of the 1836 defence of the Alamo, when a 187-strong garrison fought to save Texas from a Mexican army. (1960)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Historical drama starring John Wayne and Richard Widmark. The saga of the 1836 defence of the Alamo, when a 187-strong garrison fought to save Texas from a Mexican army. (1960)
A super-truck must travel to Brands Hatch for racing but it's too powerful to be driven on the roads, so Dan is tasked with loading the vehicle. But on the motorway, he spots an issue.
There's a four car collision outside a primary school, and a speeding driver, desperate to escape, smashes into traffic at a junction, causing carnage before escaping on foot.
Dog handler Tony comes across a most unusual sight - a naked man at the side of the road, and an unsuspecting lad sees his new 'bargain car' seized when it turns out to be cloned.
Police intercept units on patrol. Rob and Dan pursue of an under-powered runaway hatchback before the suspect decamps and makes a run for it - in a fluorescent jacket!
In Newcastle police crack down on drink and drug drivers and uninsured vehicles. And with lives at risk at a crash, officers must separate the truth from lies.
This series from the makers of Traffic Cops follows the country's highly trained police bikers: the UK's fastest responders, racing to save lives and catch suspects. (Ep1/2)
A routine area search leaves a sergeant caught off guard and surrounded by an aggressive family; an assault at a night club brings aggression and verbal abuse.
When a team of geophysicists stationed at a remote Alaskan outpost are killed by a parasitic alien life form, Mulder and Scully are called in.
